global_news.title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
global_news.summary: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.

global_news.title: OpenAI’s Sora was the creepiest app on your phone — now it’s shutting down
global_news.summary: Though the underlying Sora 2 video- and audio-generation model is scarily impressive, there was not sustained interest in an AI-only social feed.

global_news.title: Kentucky woman rejects $26M offer to turn her farm into a data center
global_news.summary: A "major artificial intelligence company" reportedly offered a Kentucky family $26 million to build a data center on their farm.

global_news.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
global_news.summary: Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in safeguards

global_news.title: Spotify tests new tool to stop AI slop from being attributed to real artists
global_news.summary: The idea behind the new tool is to give artists more control over which tracks are associated with their name on Spotify.

global_news.title: Databricks bought two startups to underpin its new AI security product
global_news.summary: With an overflowing war chest from its recent $5 billion raise, Databricks is buying startups and looking for more. It acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai.

global_news.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
global_news.summary: Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.

global_news.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
global_news.summary: OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.

global_news.title: Google TV’s new Gemini features keep fans updated on sports teams and more
global_news.summary: Three Gemini-powered features are coming to your Google TV. This includes visual responses, deep dives, and sports briefs.

global_news.title: OpenAI adds open source tools to help developers build for teen safety
global_news.summary: Rather than working from scratch to figure out how to make AI safer for teens, developers can use these policies to fortify what they build.

global_news.title: Talat’s AI meeting notes stay on your machine, not in the cloud
global_news.summary: The subscription-free AI meeting notes app is a local-first twist on notetaking tools like Granola.

global_news.title: Doss raises $55M for AI inventory management that plugs into ERP
global_news.summary: Doss's AI-powered inventory management system integrates with existing ERP systems. The Series B round was co-led by Madrona and Premji Invest.

global_news.title: Meet the former Apple designer building a new AI interface at Hark
global_news.summary: The company said it would design models, hardware, and interfaces in tandem to deliver a "seamless end-to-end personal intelligence product."

global_news.title: Mirage raises $75M to continue building models for its AI video-editing app Captions
global_news.summary: Mirage, the maker of video-editing app Captions, has raised $75 million in growth financing from General Catalyst's Customer Value Fund (CVF).

global_news.title: Agile Robots becomes the latest robotics company to partner with Google DeepMind
global_news.summary: Agile Robots will incorporate Google DeepMind's robotics foundation models into its bots while collecting data for the AI research lab.

design_news.title: Apple's latest MacBook Pro Max is ridiculously powerful and ridiculously expensive
design_news.summary: Apple takes the MacBook Pro to the next level

design_news.title: How Croak is bringing hand-drawn animation back with a modern twist
design_news.summary: Woodrunner Games' Max Petroff reveals the art of squash, stretch, and split-second precision.

design_news.title: Why Disney’s Moana trailer is causing controversy - from colour grading to The Rock’s wig
design_news.summary: Fans of the original animation aren't impressed.

design_news.title: Eurovision keeps making awful mascots and I’m here for it
Miyazaki inspired this digital artist to turn to watercolours to create his RPG world
design_news.summary: Discover Roberto Gatto's distinct watercolour art style.

design_news.title: The collectible characters in this video game all exist in the real world
design_news.summary: Sculplings was made with over 400 clay models.

design_news.title: A wildlife photographer's hilariously tragic photo of a captured vole went viral. Then it got turned into a movie poster
design_news.summary: Just look at his little face.

design_news.title: Artist shares how he created Penguin Random House's Playful Penguins campaign
design_news.summary: Alan the penguin gets an ensemble cast.
